issues.title: Add support for passing a FunctionCallbackWrapper when registering functions via ChatClientRequestSpec

comments.body:
@PedroAlvarado with  https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/9c10a08bef839ef045cc23881db6810b62a29ae9 we extended the ChatClient API with [ChatClientRequestSpec functions(FunctionCallback... functionCallbacks)](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blame/eb2deba9cb8d0bc22fb354ae3af59335eb4d740d/spring-ai-core/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/chat/client/ChatClient.java#L207).
Would this solve your case?

@PedroAlvarado I'm closing this issue as resolved by https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/9c10a08bef839ef045cc23881db6810b62a29ae9
Feel free to reopen if it doesn't address your case.
